bubble.heading: MY TECH STACK
bubble.joke: Why did the bubble pop? Because it couldn't find its inner peace and just burst into laughter!

statusDisplay.description: With Seven years of experience in the field, I've honed my skills in developing enterprise products, leading development teams, and building B2B applications. My expertise extends to a variety of industries, including manufacturing, ecommerce, and more.

speech.resumeStack: Those papers are my résumé — click them (or the label) to open the full PDF in a window.
speech.resumeLabel: Résumé shortcut — same as the stack: opens my CV.
speech.hobbies: A little board about what I do when I’m not shipping features.
speech.about: A short visual intro — who I am and how I like to work.
speech.worldMap: Where I’m based now (Toronto) and where I’m from — ask me about either.
